sections.paragraph:
ἀξιοθαύμαστος, ον (s. ἄξιος, θαῦμα, θαυμαστός; X., Mem. 1, 4, 4; Appian, Bell. Civ. 1, 6 §24; Herm. Wr., Fgm. XXIII, 5 [458, 16 Sc.]; EpArist 282) worthy of admiration (w. ἀξιαγάπητος) IPhld 5:2.—DELG s.v. θαῦμα.

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

Appian Appian , I–II a.d.—List 5

Herm. Wr. Herm. Wr. = Hermetic Writings—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

EpArist EpArist = Epistle of Aristeas, II b.c.—List 5

IPhld IPhld = Ignatius to the Philadelphians—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 93
